case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. JUAN C PRIETO

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
